tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low calcium, and low total CO₂, suggesting possible renal impairment and mild metabolic acidosis. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glycosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, supporting renal dysfunction and possible tubular damage. Lipid profile shows hypercholesterolemia and high LDL. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying renal and metabolic disorders.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
